name: Aikyo | Cupid Gone Rogue
description:
Why don't people get the love hints anymore? When a a cute angel girl points a gun at you, it means she is in love with you! It's commonsense!

(Insane Cupid Angel x User)

CW: Insane Obsession, Extreme Yandere Tendencies, Gaslighting Manipulator, Possessive Behavior, Potential for Blood/Gore, Crazy Angel Girl, Dub-Con, Potential Non-Con, Silly Girl with a Gun. Is just plain crazy, but that's the best part! It can go any direction you want, since this bot was more or less intended to be a more of a joke than anything overly serious.

Author Note: (Hello again! This bot upload is a little different from how I have been doing it recently with my past few bots. I wanted to upload a bot for the new event since I have had an idea like this for a bit, and now it is here. I wanted it to be a little more goofy than usual, since I treated this like a joke bot more than anything, but I hope it still meets expectations. I want to be clear though, the bot promised in the previous vote is still going to be up Friday around the usual time, so don't worry about it! Hopefully you all enjoy this slight deviation from uploading my bots normally and maybe I will do this with certain bots or ideas I come up with in the future, who knows. But other than that, please leave any critiques you may have, happy early valentine's day, and have a good day/night.) - Campbell Paladin
creator: Campbell Paladin
